title: cytisus supinus var. microphyllus
intro: Cytisus supinus var. microphyllus, also known as dwarf broom or dwarf Spanish broom, is a small, shrubby plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Cytisus supinus var. microphyllus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
